queries.question: List all radiologists and also list ultrasound Techs in Central Valley Clinic.
queries.sql:
SELECT Radiologist.FullName
FROM Hospital JOIN Radiologist ON Hospital.id = Radiologist.hospital_id
UNION
SELECT Ultrasound_Tech.FullName
FROM Hospital JOIN Ultrasound_Tech ON Hospital.id = Ultrasound_Tech.hospital_id
WHERE Hospital.name = "Central Valley Clinic"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?hospital a :Hospitals .
    ?radiologist a :Radiologist .
    ?radiologist p:hasHospital ?hospital .
    ?radiologist p:name ?fullname .
    BIND(?fullname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?hospital a :Hospitals .
    ?ultrasound_tech a :Ultrasound_Tech .
    ?ultrasound_tech p:hasHospital ?hospital .
    ?ultrasound_tech p:name ?fullname .
    ?hospital p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Central Valley Clinic")
    BIND(?fullname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Give me radiologists and ultrasound techs who are in Central Valley Clinic.
queries.sql:
SELECT Radiologist.FullName
FROM Hospital JOIN Radiologist ON Hospital.id = Radiologist.hospital_id
WHERE Hospital.name = "Central Valley Clinic"
UNION
SELECT Ultrasound_Tech.FullName
FROM Hospital JOIN Ultrasound_Tech ON Hospital.id = Ultrasound_Tech.hospital_id
WHERE Hospital.name = "Central Valley Clinic"
